untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'open buy volume in options market' which is not available in the allowed indicators list. The allowed volume indicators (volume, vol_ratio_20, hvol_20) measure underlying stock volume and volatility, not options market order flow or buy/sell volume discrimination. Options market microstructure data (bid/ask imbalance, options open interest by type, options order book flow) is not provided.
translation_notes: The core signal logic is: buy stock when options market shows high buy volume, hold 1 day. This requires real-time options order flow data that is outside the scope of the provided technical indicators (price, volume, moving averages, oscillators). A proxy using underlying stock volume spike could be attempted, but would not capture the intended options market signal.
